title: Remove weekend days from timeline calculations
excerpt: We work on a M-F schedule and when creating templates that contain duration of tasks or when I am just creating a project board, it uses weekends in the calculation or duration. I have to spend a good amount of time read…

posts.author: lbart424 (Lisa Bart)
posts.cookedHtml: We work on a M-F schedule and when creating templates that contain duration of tasks or when I am just creating a project board, it uses weekends in the calculation or duration. I have to spend a good amount of time readjusting the timelines when I am creating a project board which is not ideal.

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lbart424 - You can use this automation whenever you have a defined duration, it’ll calculate the timeline accurately while skipping weekends.

When the Duration is set, update the Timeline from this Date with weekends excluded.

This is all possible with our Smart Timeline + Duration app, available in the monday.com marketplace.

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this would be super helpful! Removing weekends automatically would save a lot of time when setting up project timelines.
